audit_result.proof_trace: Validation exists but is only enforced on gossip path (L480). RPC paths (DataColumnsByRoot/ByRange at lighthouse_network/src/rpc/codec.rs:696,717) and database loads (store/src/hot_cold_store.rs:2529,3252) bypass the guard, allowing mismatched array lengths.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Malicious peer sends RPC response with column.len()≠kzg_commitments.len()≠kzg_proofs.len(). Deserialization succeeds, validation is skipped, KZG verification accesses wrong indices causing out-of-bounds panic or incorrect proof validation.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-010.text: Column, kzg_commitments, and kzg_proofs arrays must all have equal length.
